top_predictors.name: invasion_bump
top_predictors.meaning: Feb-Dec 2022 adoption spike — the invasion effect is the #1 predictor

top_predictors.name: category (food)
top_predictors.meaning: Food terms resist adoption (recipe search inertia)

top_predictors.name: category (historical)
top_predictors.meaning: Historical terms deeply entrenched (Russian identity claim)

top_predictors.name: is_compound
top_predictors.meaning: Multi-word terms adopt faster (more editorial control)

top_predictors.name: campaign_gain
top_predictors.meaning: Campaign-era gains partially reversed (regression to mean)

key_finding: The Feb 2022 invasion is the dominant predictor (β=0.87) — it reshuffled adoption rankings. Pre-2022 baseline, which explained 54% alone, drops to near-zero when invasion bump is included. Category adds 11pp. Full model: R²=0.87, adj=0.82.
